name: sourceType
label: Source
help: Where the screenshot content comes from.

nested.name: url
nested.label: URL
nested.help: The URL of the page to capture.

nested.name: html
nested.label: HTML
nested.help: Inline HTML to capture. Use self-contained markup; external scripts loaded from a CDN can hang the converter.

nested.name: templateId
nested.label: Template ID
nested.help: ID of a saved template from the PolyDoc dashboard.

nested.name: templateData
nested.label: Template Data (JSON)
nested.help: JSON object of variables passed to the Liquid template renderer.

name: fullPage
label: Full Page
help: Capture the entire scrollable page rather than just the viewport.

name: quality
label: Quality
help: Compression quality for JPEG and WebP, 0 to 100.

name: viewportWidth
label: Viewport Width
help: Viewport width in CSS pixels. Set together with height.

name: viewportHeight
label: Viewport Height
help: Viewport height in CSS pixels. Set together with width.

name: devicePixelRatio
label: Device Pixel Ratio
help: Device pixel ratio, e.g. 2 for retina. Applies only when width and height are set.

name: delivery
label: Delivery
help: How the generated image is returned.

nested.name: presignedUrl
nested.label: Presigned URL
nested.help: HTTP PUT presigned URL from your storage provider (S3 / GCS / Azure).

nested.name: webhookUrl
nested.label: Webhook URL
nested.help: URL the generated image is delivered to.

nested.name: webhookOptions
nested.label: Webhook Options (JSON)
nested.help: Extra webhook settings merged with the URL: async, method, headers, retries, retryDelay, timeout.

name: tag
label: Tag
help: Label for logging and analytics (max 30 chars).

name: advanced
label: Advanced (JSON)
help: Raw fields deep-merged into the request body for any API option not exposed above, e.g. screenshot.clip, screenshot.omitBackground, render, request.
